Orange County Perinatal Council
Content block block-countyoc-content

Body
Mission Statement:
The Orange County Perinatal Council (OCPC) is dedicated to supporting optimal perinatal health and wellness for Orange County’s women and babies- before, during and after birth.
Membership:
OCPC represents a broad range of community stakeholders, organizations, and health care providers. All interested individuals and organization representatives are invited to participate.
OCPC Recruitment Flyer
Current Activities:
OCPC has current collaborative efforts addressing the following screening, health promotion, support, and early intervention issues:
Meetings:

Meetings are subject to change without notice.  Please call (714) 567-6250 to confirm meeting day/time.
